properties.name: starter.object-mapper.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the ObjectMapper auto-configuration provided by this starter.

properties.name: starter.audit.data.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable audit auto-configuration (AuditorAware and JPA auditing integration).

properties.name: starter.audit.data.default-system-id
properties.description: Fallback auditor ID used when no authenticated user is available in the current request context.
